productDisplayName: FILA Men Coloda Black Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Coloda running shoe comes in a low profile silhouette and is packed with features, making it a great buy, especially for underpronators. UpperHeavily meshed upper with an inner bootie and strategically placed overlays for enhanced breathable comfort and shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticPull loop for ease on/off and to hang the shoes from a backpackMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection, with a splash print design for heightened styleOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfootShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
